_comment: V3-15 Gold Standard Engine — Hardcoded Config. This file is the persistent memory for all V3-15 threshold rules. It survives container restarts, Railway redeploys, and context flushes. NEVER modify without explicit admin instruction.

api_budget.comment: 10 calls always reserved for manual admin dashboard actions

data_sources.fallback_soccer: The Odds API (api.the-odds-api.com) — activated when API-Football is suspended
data_sources.fallback_nba: The Odds API (api.the-odds-api.com) — activated when API-Basketball is suspended
data_sources.fixtures_scraper: ESPN free API (no credits) — every 6 hours
data_sources.results_settler: The Odds API scores endpoint — every 2 hours

fail_safe_rules.suspended_key: On ApiSuspendedError: log critical alert, fall back to The Odds API, do NOT retry
fail_safe_rules.timeout: 15 second AbortController timeout per API call; exponential backoff 2s/4s/8s on failure
fail_safe_rules.zero_picks: On 0 picks generated: log warning, mark dailyRunCompleted=true, do NOT retry cascade
fail_safe_rules.partial_sync: On partial sync: log warning, mark complete, do NOT retry
fail_safe_rules.kill_switch: After 3 failed GlobalMonitor attempts: stop all auto-tasks, send critical alert
fail_safe_rules.startup_catchup: On Railway restart after 1 AM: check for missing picks, trigger generation once

no_dark_policy.description: Never show 0 picks. If primary threshold (68%) fails, fall back to 65% hard floor with High Volatility label. Never publish picks below 65%.

multi_sport_sync.description: Both Soccer AND NBA picks must be present before publishing. If only one sport available, retry up to 3 times with 10-minute gaps.
